_description: Residual cascade (asymmetric: large → small, detach) — Stage 0 U-Net [48,96,192,384] ~17M (heavy coarse denoiser) + Stage 1 ResUNet [16,32,64,128] ~1.9M (lightweight refiner). Direction control for the small→large asymmetric variant: same total params, capacities swapped between stages. Separates 'asymmetry helps' from 'coarse-then-fine helps'. If small→large wins and this loses, the directional claim is defensible.
